summary: Crisp matrix mix captures a high‑energy late‑80s show highlighted by a killer Thin Man, Cumberland and an unforgettable Fire.
review: The recording is a well‑balanced matrix blend that preserves the room vibe while keeping Jerry’s guitar crisp and the crowd roar vivid. Musically the night shines with standout performances of The Thin Man, Cumberland, Space‑>So What and a scorching Fire on the Mountain, though Miracle received a lukewarm reaction. Overall the show feels adventurous and tightly executed, making it a prized late‑80s gem.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings (average >4) and many reviewers praise both the performance and the matrix sound quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, clean mix; first two tracks are pure matrix then switch to SBD. Reviewers note strong Jerry guitar tone, clear vocals and an immersive crowd feel with no major drop‑outs.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Opening with high‑energy numbers set an upbeat tone; the second set builds with adventurous jams (Space → So What, Scarlet/Fire) and a powerful Fire on the Mountain finale, delivering a cohesive and exciting arc.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His guitar is described as strong, quick, crisp and his vocals loud and full of feeling.
band_member_comments.Bob: Weir’s rhythm guitar is noted as nice, loud and crispy.
